blockers.id: playwright/e2e/auth/sign-in.spec.ts:clicking Sign in with GitHub navigates toward GitHub OAuth
blockers.reason: Skipped unless AUTH_GITHUB_ID env var is set; this is the only test asserting the OAuth 'repo' scope request (1.2-AC1)
blockers.test_title: clicking "Sign in with GitHub" navigates toward GitHub OAuth

blockers.id: playwright/e2e/onboarding/onboarding.spec.ts:encrypted token is never visible in the browser
blockers.reason: Skipped, requires real GitHub credentials; assertion independently covered at unit/integration level (1.3-AC3)
blockers.test_title: encrypted token is never visible in the browser — response body check (AC-3)

blockers.id: playwright/e2e/onboarding/onboarding.spec.ts:org OAuth App restriction error explicitly names the org cause
blockers.reason: Skipped, requires an org with OAuth App restrictions enabled; assertion independently covered at unit/component level (1.3-AC4)
blockers.test_title: org OAuth App restriction error explicitly names the org cause — not a generic message (AC-4)

recommendations.action: Add a negative-path test proving cross-tenant token resolution is denied
Add a test proving the 401/403 credential-health flip completes before the operation returns (within one cycle)
Add a unit-level assertion that the GitHub provider requests scope: 'repo', independent of the skipped E2E test
Add an integration/E2E test for the full re-auth cycle (failed -> healthy) that also asserts the RepoConnection row is not deleted
Fix the two weak-assertion AppShell.test.tsx cases already flagged in test-review-1-8.md (M-1, M-2)
Run /bmad-testarch-test-review on Story 1.6's test files given the two P0 gaps found here
